title: lantana glandulosissima f. sargentii
intro: Lantana glandulosissima f. sargentii, also known as Sargent's Lantana, is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Lantana plant species, native to the tropical regions of Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to exhibit antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Sargent's Lantana include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, or used in herbal remedies such as ointments and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
